name: io.github.zwitbaum/mcp-devops-on-prem
title: DevOps On-Premises
description: MCP server for on-prem Azure DevOps: repos, pull requests, work items, and wiki.

environmentVariables.name: DEVOPS_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Full Azure DevOps Server project URL, e.g. https://server/org/project

environmentVariables.name: DEVOPS_PAT
environmentVariables.description: Personal Access Token for PAT authentication

environmentVariables.name: DEVOPS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: OAuth bearer token for bearer-token authentication
